docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $425.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, SUSIE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, TUYET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SUSIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, TUYET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SUSIE JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TUYET TRAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SUSIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRAN, TUYET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
